options.label: IP20
options.description: Protected against solid objects >12.5mm, no water protection

options.label: IP30
options.description: Protected against solid objects >2.5mm, no water protection

options.label: IP40
options.description: Protected against solid objects >1mm, no water protection

options.label: IP42
options.description: Protected against objects >1mm, dripping water at 15°

options.label: IP65
options.description: Dust tight, protected against water jets

options.label: IP66
options.description: Dust tight, protected against powerful water jets

options.label: IP67
options.description: Dust tight, protected against temporary immersion

options.label: IP68
options.description: Dust tight, protected against continuous immersion

options.label: IP69K
options.description: Dust tight, protected against high pressure/temperature water

options.label: Not Rated
options.description: No IP rating assigned or tested
